reviews.review_description: This game is incredibly fun and truly showcases the impressive potential of VR for language learning. It opens up an exciting new field, making the learning process interactive and immersive. I'm thrilled to see how this game will continue to evolve and really hope there are updates on the way! 🫶🏻
Super easy and convenient app to practise. I'm doing Japanese and can just dip in and out. P.S. the little verb actions you do are hilarious.
